THE_ARCHITECT.talk.AEMEATHWW-AEMEATH.0-0: So this is the top of the Spire?
AEMEATH_XIANGU_ANCIENT.title: Tunneler
AEMEATH_XIANGU_ANCIENT.pages.INITIAL.des: A hidden ancient emerges from beneath the dust and offers three relics. Choose one.
AEMEATH_XIANGU_ANCIENT.pages.DONE.descri: The ancient slips back underground, leaving only traces in the dust.
AEMEATH_XIANGU_ANCIENT.talk.firstVisitEv: You found me before I was ready.
Take one relic, then keep moving.

AEMEATH_XIANGU_ANCIENT.talk.ANY.0-1r.anc: A traveler in the deeper layers. Take one relic and move on.
AEMEATH_XIANGU_ANCIENT.talk.AEMEATHWW-AE: Names are noise. Pick one relic, and keep walking.
